claims.text: Modeling and generating 3D human-object interactions from text is crucial for applications in AR, XR, and gaming
claims.source_quote: Modeling and generating 3D human-object interactions from text is crucial for applications in AR, XR, and gaming.

claims.text: Existing approaches rely on score distillation from text-to-image models
claims.source_quote: Existing approaches often rely on score distillation from text-to-image models

claims.text: Existing approaches suffer from the Janus problem
claims.source_quote: their results suffer from the Janus problem

claims.text: Existing approaches do not follow text prompts faithfully due to scarcity of high-quality interaction data
claims.source_quote: do not follow text prompts faithfully due to the scarcity of high-quality interaction data

claims.text: Hoi3DGen generates high-quality textured meshes of human-object interactions that follow input interaction descriptions precisely
claims.source_quote: a framework that generates high-quality textured meshes of human-object interaction that follow the input interaction descriptions precisely

claims.text: Hoi3DGen surpasses baselines by 4-15x in text consistency
claims.source_quote: surpasses baselines by 4-15x in text consistency

claims.text: Hoi3DGen surpasses baselines by 3-7x in 3D model quality
Hoi3DGen exhibits strong generalization to diverse categories and interaction types
claims.source_quote: exhibiting strong generalization to diverse categories and interaction types
